title: One North Star that fuses compliance, conversion and trust
subtitle: Valid Consent Coverage Rate — high VCCR means legally protected AND users aren't bouncing.
diagram_alt: VCCR North Star broken into Valid, Granular, Reach, Trust drivers with guardrails and lagging outcome.

north_star.name: Valid Consent Coverage Rate (VCCR)
north_star.def: % of MAU with explicit, granular, unbundled, ledger-verified consent for every active processing purpose.

success: Compliance: zero audit findings; passes DPB mock audit
Ops: 100% real-time ledger sync, zero data loss / 30d
notes: VCCR is the only metric combining legal safety with engagement. High VCCR but onboarding drops → tighten JIT timing. Low VCCR but onboarding fine → compliance leak.
